title: Jesus Watches you at low health
description: Simple datapack that flashes a periodic image at low health. Effect is intensified at lower health and when near enemies. Resource pack can be edited to use whatever overlay or sound you want
body: This data pack + resource pack will flash an image periodically and play a sound while at low health and near enemies. In this instance, it is an image of jesus with bells playing (Based off a random video I found on Twitter). The resource pack contains just the image and sound file, so you can edit them to make whatever low-health effect you want. Only requires three functions and an advancement
